de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution

Class ExecutionNodeReader.SEDSAXHandler

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.xml.sax.helpers.DefaultHandler
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.ExecutionNodeReader.SEDSAXHandler
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    ContentHandler, DTDHandler, EntityResolver, ErrorHandler
    Enclosing class:
    ExecutionNodeReader

    private class ExecutionNodeReader.SEDSAXHandler
extends DefaultHandler
    DefaultHandler implementation used in ExecutionNodeReader.read(InputStream).
    Author:
    Martin Hentschel

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      private Map<ExecutionNodeReader.AbstractKeYlessExecutionBlockStartNode<?>,List<String>> blockCompletionEntries
      Maps an ExecutionNodeReader.AbstractKeYlessExecutionBlockStartNode to the path entries of its block completions.
      private Map<ExecutionNodeReader.AbstractKeYlessExecutionNode<?>,List<String>> callStackPathEntries
      Maps an ExecutionNodeReader.AbstractKeYlessExecutionNode to the path entries of its call stack.
      private Map<ExecutionNodeReader.AbstractKeYlessExecutionNode<?>,List<Pair<String,String>>> completedBlockEntries
      Maps an ExecutionNodeReader.AbstractKeYlessExecutionNode to its completed block entries
      private Map<ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessMethodCall,List<String>> methodReturnPathEntries
      Maps an ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessMethodCall to the path entries of its method returns.
      private Deque<ExecutionNodeReader.AbstractKeYlessExecutionNode<?>> parentNodeStack
      The parent hierarchy filled by startElement(String, String, String, Attributes) and emptied by endElement(String, String, String).
      private Deque<Object> parentVariableValueStack
      The parent hierarchy of IExecutionVariable and IExecutionValue filled by startElement(String, String, String, Attributes) and emptied by endElement(String, String, String).
      private IExecutionNode<?> root
      The root of the read symbolic execution tree.
      private Map<ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessStart,List<String>> terminationPathEntries
      Maps an ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessStart to the path entries of its terminations.
